text.description: Text to convert to speech. Supports non-verbal tags like [laughter], [sigh], and pronunciation control.
text.title: Text

mode.description: Generation mode: 'voice_cloning' (clone from reference audio), 'voice_design' (describe voice attributes), or 'auto' (model picks a voice)

ref_audio.description: Reference audio for voice cloning (3-10 seconds recommended). Required for voice_cloning mode.
ref_audio.title: Ref Audio

ref_text.description: Transcription of the reference audio. If omitted, Whisper ASR auto-transcribes it.
ref_text.title: Ref Text

instruct.description: Voice design attributes for voice_design mode. Comma-separated: e.g. 'female, low pitch, british accent'. Supports gender, age, pitch, accent, whisper.
instruct.title: Instruct

num_step.description: Number of diffusion steps. Lower (16) = faster, higher (32) = better quality.
num_step.title: Num Step

duration.description: Fixed output duration in seconds. Overrides speed if set.
duration.title: Duration
